summary: Completed testing of VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) feature - Iteration 14. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). VWAP endpoint /api/vwap/{symbol}?timeframe=1H returns vwap, upper_1, lower_1, upper_2, lower_2, std, position, distance_pct, distance_std, signal, interpretation. POST /api/analyze includes vwap field. Frontend VWAP panel renders with all required data-testid elements. Chart shows VWAP line (amber) and ±1σ/±2σ bands.
passed_tests: ✅ VWAP response has all required fields (vwap, upper_1, lower_1, upper_2, lower_2, std, position, distance_pct, distance_std, signal, interpretation)
✅ VWAP values valid: vwap=24314.13, std=385.21, bands properly ordered
✅ VWAP position valid: BELOW_VWAP (one of ABOVE_VWAP, BELOW_VWAP, ABOVE_1STD, BELOW_1STD, ABOVE_2STD, BELOW_2STD)
✅ VWAP signal valid: CAUTION (one of CONFIRM, CAUTION)
✅ POST /api/analyze includes 'vwap' field with all required fields
✅ Regression: GET /api/ofi/MNQ returns 200 with ofi_fast, ofi_slow, signal
✅ Regression: GET /api/treasury returns 200 with us2y, us10y, spread_bps, curve_state
✅ Frontend: VWAP panel visible with data-testid='vwap-panel'
✅ Frontend: VWAP position badge shows 'BELOW VWAP' (data-testid='vwap-position')
✅ Frontend: VWAP interpretation shows Portuguese text (data-testid='vwap-interpretation')
✅ Frontend: VWAP Bands visualization shows -2σ, -1σ, VWAP, +1σ, +2σ levels
✅ Frontend: Chart legend includes VWAP, -1σ, -2σ entries
✅ Frontend: OFI panel still renders (regression check)
✅ Frontend: Volume Profile panel still renders (regression check)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses DataBento historical OHLCV data for VWAP calculation
context_for_next_testing_agent: VWAP feature fully tested. VWAP endpoint /api/vwap/{symbol}?timeframe=1H returns vwap, upper_1, lower_1, upper_2, lower_2, std, position (ABOVE_VWAP/BELOW_VWAP/ABOVE_1STD/BELOW_1STD/ABOVE_2STD/BELOW_2STD), distance_pct, distance_std, signal (CONFIRM/CAUTION), interpretation. POST /api/analyze includes vwap field. Frontend VWAP panel (data-testid='vwap-panel') shows VWAP value, position badge, distance %, σ distance, bands visualization, and interpretation. Chart shows VWAP as solid amber line with ±1σ (dashed) and ±2σ (dotted) bands. Current observed: VWAP=$24,314.13, position=BELOW_VWAP, distance=-0.75% (-0.5σ). OFI and Treasury endpoints still working (regression verified).

feature_verification.vwap_endpoint: Working - GET /api/vwap/{symbol}?timeframe=1H returns all required fields
feature_verification.analyze_vwap: Working - POST /api/analyze includes vwap field with all band values
feature_verification.vwap_panel: Working - Shows VWAP value, position, distance %, σ distance, bands, interpretation
feature_verification.chart_vwap_lines: Working - Chart shows VWAP line (amber) and ±1σ/±2σ bands in legend
feature_verification.ofi_regression: Working - OFI panel and endpoint still functional

observed_values.interpretation: Preco ($24132.25) abaixo do VWAP ($24314.13): fluxo vendedor dominante. Rallies ao VWAP sao oportunidades de venda.

mocked_api_note: VWAP uses real DataBento historical OHLCV data. OFI uses simulated data when market is closed (Saturday).
